understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate a grid-based puzzle, altering my piece's shape, color, and rotation via modifier tiles to match the requirements of goal cells, then stepping onto those goals to complete all levels while managing limited stamina and lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game mechanics involve moving on a grid where each move costs 1 stamina. Running out of stamina loses a life and resets stamina. Walls block movement, and 'blocked_directions' indicate impassable directions. Modifier tiles cycle shape (0-5), color (orange→blue→green→red→orange), or rotation (0°→90°→180°→270°→0° clockwise). A goal cell activates only when my piece's shape, color, and rotation all match its requirements simultaneously. Completing all goals advances the level, and losing all lives ends the game. I must plan routes avoiding walls and retrying blocked directions wastes stamina.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate a grid-based puzzle, altering my piece's shape, color, and rotation via modifier tiles to match the requirements of goal cells, then stepping onto those goals to complete all levels while managing limited stamina and lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game mechanics involve moving on a grid where each move costs 1 stamina. Running out of stamina loses a life and resets stamina. Walls block movement, and 'blocked_directions' indicate impassable directions. Modifier tiles cycle shape (0-5), color (orange→blue→green→red→orange), or rotation (0°→90°→180°→270°→0° clockwise). A goal cell activates only when my piece's shape, color, and rotation all match its requirements simultaneously. Completing all goals advances the level, and losing all lives ends the game. I must plan routes avoiding walls and retrying blocked directions wastes stamina.
